mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game (name, description, cover_image, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{coverImage}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE game SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, cover_image, created_at, updated_at FROM game ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, description, cover_image, created_at, updated_at FROM game WHERE name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC
